Sun indicates chemicals. Venus in the
2nd house indicates a luxury product and sour taste. The Moon and Jupiter
indicate rice and sweet taste. Mars indicates pungent product. All these things

Jupiter and the Moon are in the second house from Venus. This indi
cates that the wealth of the native's father will be lost.
The native will be married during his 28th year. From his 34th year to
his 54th year the native will have great prosperity.
He will have three children.
